name: Amplitude
description: Search, access, and get insights on your Amplitude data
longDescription: Official Amplitude MCP server for product analytics. Search dashboards, query charts, analyze experiments, access session replays, manage feature flags, and explore user behavior data through natural language.
author: com.amplitude
examplePrompts: Search for dashboards related to user retention
Show me the results of my latest experiment
Query chart data for the last 30 days
Find session replays for users who dropped off
What are my feature flag configurations?
